pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage for an industrial cement and lime manufacturer, providing an entry point to products, tools, and key actions.
primary_functions: Provide high-level overview of cement, lime, and low-carbon product ranges and value propositions.
Offer direct navigation to product categories, concrete calculators, distributor locator, events, careers, cart, and quote request.
Highlight featured low-carbon cements, promotions, and upcoming webinars or news.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Cement Products' tile or header link
Click on 'Lime Products' tile or header link
Click on 'Low-Carbon Cements' tile or header link
Click on 'Concrete Calculators' in main navigation or homepage CTA
Click on 'Where to Buy' link or CTA
Click on an upcoming event card or 'Events & Webinars' link
Click on 'Careers' teaser or header link

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Home' link in the main navigation and company logo
Accessed directly via the root URL (index.html)

pages.name: Product Listing
pages.description: Category listing page used for cement, lime, and low-carbon cement products.
primary_functions: Display lists of products for a selected category (e.g., cement, lime, low_carbon_cements) based on the categoryId parameter.

Provide filtering by attributes such as packaging (bulk, bags, big bags), strength class/type, product type (quicklime, hydrated lime), physical form (lumps, powder), CaO content, CO 2082  emissions, and price.
Allow sorting of results by criteria such as price per ton (low to high) and relevance.
Enable users to open product detail pages and optionally add items directly to comparison or quote from the listing.

incoming_params.description: Required category code for listing products; expected values: 'cement', 'lime', or 'low_carbon_cements'.
Optional search query used to filter products by name or description.
Selected packaging group(s) such as 'bulk', 'bags', or 'big_bags'.
Selected cement strength classes/types (e.g., 'CEM I 42.5R', 'CEM I 52.5R').
Selected cement family codes (e.g., 'cem_i', 'cem_ii').
Selected lime type codes (e.g., 'quicklime', 'hydrated_lime').
Selected physical forms (e.g., 'lumps', 'powder', 'milled').
Minimum CaO content percentage filter (e.g., 90 for CaO ≥ 90%).
Maximum CO₂ emissions in kg CO₂/ton filter (e.g., 450).
Minimum price per ton filter.
Maximum price per ton filter (e.g., 120 for ≤ $120/ton).
Currency code used for price filters and display (e.g., 'usd', 'eur').
Sorting mode (e.g., 'price_per_ton_asc', 'relevance').
Current pagination page number.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product card or product name in the listing
Click on 'Compare' header icon after adding one or more products to comparison
Click on 'Quote Request' header link after adding items to quote

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Cement Products', 'Lime Products', or 'Low-Carbon Cements' header links with categoryId set accordingly
Accessed via shared links including categoryId and optional filters/sort parameters

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed page for a single cement or lime product, including technical data, pricing, and purchase/enquiry actions.
primary_functions: Show full technical and commercial details for a product, including specifications (e.g., strength class, CaO content, CO 2082  footprint), packaging, and price per ton or per bag.
Allow users to configure the order quantity (tons or bags), select packaging and delivery options (e.g., bulk delivery), and choose a requested delivery date via a date picker.
Provide actions to Add to Cart, Add to Quote, and Add to Comparison List.
Offer access to downloadable documents such as Technical Data Sheets (TDS) and Safety Data Sheets (SDS).

incoming_params.description: Product ID whose full technical and commercial details should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'View Cart' or equivalent link after adding a product to the cart
Click on 'View Quote' or 'Go to Quote' after adding the product to a quote
Click on 'Compare' icon/link after adding the product to comparison list

access_methods.description: Accessed by navigating to product_detail.html with the 'id' parameter set to a valid product ID
Accessed via clicks on product cards, calculator recommendations, quotes, cart, or comparison list

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping cart summary page for reviewing and adjusting items to be ordered.
primary_functions: Display all items added to the shopping cart with product names, quantities, unit prices, delivery dates, and subtotals.
Allow users to update quantities or remove items from the cart before finalizing or saving the order.
Summarize overall order totals and key order information for review prior to checkout or submission to sales.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product name in the cart to view its details
Click on 'Continue shopping' link targeting cement products

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Cart' link in the main navigation
Accessed via 'View Cart' links shown after adding products to the cart

pages.name: Concrete Calculators
pages.description: Tools & Resources page hosting concrete and material calculators.
primary_functions: Present available calculators, including a Concrete Volume & Cement Requirement calculator for slabs.
Allow users to input parameters such as slab length, width, thickness, and application type (e.g., industrial/warehouse floor) and compute required concrete and cement quantities.
Display calculation results in tons and show recommended cement products (e.g., CEM I 52.5R) with links to their product detail pages.

incoming_params.description: Optional calculator type code; defaults to 'concrete_volume_and_cement_requirement'.
Optional previous calculator session ID to reload past inputs and results.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a recommended CEM I 52.5R cement in the calculator results
Click on 'Browse all CEM I 52.5R cements' link below calculator results

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Concrete Calculators' link in the main navigation
Accessed via the 'Concrete Calculators' link in the footer
Accessed with optional calculatorType and sessionId parameters to control initial state

pages.name: Distributor Locator
pages.description: Locator page for finding distributors and bulk suppliers.
primary_functions: Provide a search form where users can enter postal code, country, search radius, and product/segment filters such as bulk cement.
Display search results as a list (and optionally a map) of matching distributors with distance and key contact information.
Offer sorting options such as distance: nearest first and links to open detailed distributor profile pages.

incoming_params.description: Optional postal code to prefill the locator search form (e.g., '75008').
Optional country code to preselect in the country dropdown (e.g., 'france').
Optional search radius in kilometers (e.g., 100).
Optional product segment code(s), such as 'bulk_cement'.
Optional sort mode, e.g., 'distance_asc'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a distributor name in the locator results list

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Where to Buy' link in the main navigation
Accessed via the 'Find a Distributor' link in the footer
Accessed with optional postalCode, country, radiusKm, and productSegments parameters for pre-filled searches

pages.name: Distributor Detail
pages.description: Profile page for an individual distributor or sales partner.
primary_functions: Show detailed information about a distributor, including name, address, contact details, service areas, and supported product segments.
Provide a prominent 'Contact Sales' or 'Request Information' button that opens an embedded contact form on the page.
Enable users to submit distributor-specific inquiries including name, email, location, and a custom message referencing the distributor.

incoming_params.description: Distributor ID whose detailed profile and contact form should be displayed.

access_methods.description: Accessed by navigating from the locator results with an 'id' parameter identifying the distributor
Accessed via links from email campaigns or saved bookmarks to specific distributors

pages.name: Product Comparison
pages.description: Comparison page to evaluate selected products side by side.
primary_functions: Display all products added to the comparison list with key attributes (e.g., CO 2082  footprint, strength class, price per ton, packaging).
Highlight differences between products to help users choose the best option, especially for low-carbon cements.
Allow users to remove items from the comparison list or click through to product detail pages for more information.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product name within the comparison table

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Compare' link/icon in the main navigation
Accessed after adding at least one item to comparison from product listings or detail pages

pages.name: Events & Webinars
pages.description: Listing page for company events, seminars, and webinars.
primary_functions: List upcoming events and webinars with titles, dates, times, locations (if applicable), and brief descriptions.
Provide filters for event type (e.g., webinars only), date range, and keyword search (e.g., 'sustainable cement').
Allow users to open detailed event pages to see more information and register.

incoming_params.description: Optional event type filter (e.g., 'webinar').
Optional start date for the date range filter in ISO or site-specific format (e.g., '2025-06-01').
Optional end date for the date range filter (e.g., '2025-06-30').
Optional keyword to search within event titles and descriptions (e.g., 'sustainable cement').
Optional country filter for onsite events.
Pagination page number for the events list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an event/webinar title in the listing

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Events & Webinars' link in the main navigation
Accessed via the 'Events & Webinars' link in the footer

pages.name: Event Detail
pages.description: Detail page for an individual event or webinar with registration.
primary_functions: Display comprehensive information about a selected event or webinar, including agenda, speakers, date, start time, and time zone.
Provide a clear 'Register' or 'Sign Up' call-to-action that reveals or scrolls to an on-page registration form.
Enable users to complete and submit registration details such as name, email, company, job role, and country.

incoming_params.description: Event ID of the webinar or event whose details and registration form should be displayed.

access_methods.description: Accessed from the events listing by passing the event ID in the 'id' URL parameter
Accessed from homepage 'upcoming events' teasers or email campaigns linking directly to the event

pages.name: Quote Summary
pages.description: Quote basket page showing all products added to a quote request and their estimated costs.
primary_functions: Display all items added to the quote request with product names, quantities, unit prices, and estimated line totals.
Allow users to adjust quantities (e.g., tons of cement, number of hydrated lime bags) until the estimated total falls within a desired budget range.
Show the updated estimated total and provide a 'Proceed to Contact Details' or similar action to continue the quote process.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the 'Proceed to Contact Details' button
Click on a product name within the quote items list

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Quote Request' link in the main navigation
Accessed via the 'Quote Request' link in the footer
Accessed via 'View Quote' links after adding a product to quote from a listing or detail page

pages.name: Quote Contact Details
pages.description: Second step of the quote process for entering requester information.
primary_functions: Collect requester contact information such as name, email, phone, company, and project location.
Summarize the contents and estimated total of the quote for confirmation.
Allow users to submit the full quote request to the manufacturer�19s sales team for follow-up.

access_methods.description: Accessed after clicking 'Proceed to Contact Details' on quote.html for an in-progress quote
Can be revisited directly via URL if a draft quote exists in local storage

pages.name: Careers
pages.description: Careers portal listing open positions and providing job search tools.
primary_functions: List open positions with key information such as job title, location, department, and brief summaries.
Provide filters for country/region (e.g., Germany), department or functional area (e.g., Environment, Health & Safety), and keyword search (e.g., 'Engineer').
Enable users to open detailed job description pages and initiate online applications.

incoming_params.description: Optional country filter for job listings (e.g., 'germany').
Optional department filter (e.g., 'environment_health_safety').
Optional keyword string to search job titles and summaries (e.g., 'Engineer').
Pagination page number for the job listings.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a job title in the careers listing

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Careers' link in the main navigation
Accessed via the 'Careers' link in the footer

pages.name: Job Detail
pages.description: Detailed job description page for a specific open position.
primary_functions: Present the full job description, responsibilities, qualifications, and required experience (e.g., at least 3 years).
Highlight key details such as location, department, and employment type.
Provide an 'Apply Online' or 'Apply Now' button that leads to the job application form.

incoming_params.description: Job posting ID whose details should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the 'Apply Online' or 'Apply Now' button

access_methods.description: Accessed by selecting a job from the careers listing with the 'id' parameter set

pages.name: Job Application
pages.description: First step of the online application form for a selected job.
primary_functions: Display the initial application form requesting personal information such as name, email, phone number, and location.
Capture professional experience details such as total years of experience (e.g., selecting a value above 3 years).
Include simple eligibility or preference questions (e.g., willingness to travel) and allow users to proceed to the next step without uploading documents.

incoming_params.description: Job posting ID for which the application is being created; used to load title and contextual information.

access_methods.description: Accessed by clicking 'Apply' on a job detail page with the jobId passed as a URL parameter
On submission, stays on or advances within the same page for subsequent steps of the application

pages.name: About Us
pages.description: Corporate information page about the cement and lime manufacturer.
primary_functions: Describe the company�19s history, manufacturing operations, core markets, and product portfolio in cement and lime.
Highlight sustainability initiatives, including low-carbon cement development and CO 2082  reduction targets.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Contact Us' call-to-action within the About Us page

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'About Us' link in the footer
Accessed via internal links from other pages describing the company

pages.name: Contact Us
pages.description: General contact page for corporate and non-sales inquiries.
primary_functions: Provide corporate contact details including addresses, phone numbers, and general email addresses.
Offer a generic inquiry form for questions, feedback, or support not covered by specific product or distributor forms.

incoming_params.description: Optional preselected topic for the inquiry form (e.g., 'sustainability', 'general').

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Contact Us' link in the footer
Accessed from calls-to-action on various pages when a general contact is appropriate

pages.name: Legal & Privacy
pages.description: Combined legal information page for the website.
primary_functions: Present the website�19s terms of use, privacy policy, and cookie policy in a single location.
Explain data handling practices for user-submitted forms such as cart, quote requests, event registrations, and job applications.

incoming_params.description: Optional document type to scroll to or emphasize; expected values like 'terms_of_use', 'privacy_policy', 'cookie_policy'.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Legal & Privacy' link in the footer
Accessed with a 'document' query parameter to deep-link to a specific legal document section

header_links.description: Homepage with overview of products, tools, and key actions
Bulk and bagged cement product range
Quicklime, hydrated lime, and other lime products
Eco and low-CO 2082  cement product range
Tools for concrete volume and cement requirement calculations
Find distributors and bulk cement suppliers
View and adjust products added to a quote request
Search and explore open job opportunities
View and manage items added to the shopping cart

footer_links.description: Learn more about the company and its operations
General contact details and inquiry form
View upcoming events, seminars, and webinars
Explore career opportunities and apply online
Review items added for quotation and proceed to contact
Read terms of use, privacy policy, and cookie policy
